Macros, error handling, standard library includes, type definitions, and utility functions for JerryScript.


## Files
- **[jrt-bit-fields.h](jrt-bit-fields.h.md)**: Macros for extracting and setting bit-fields in a container.
- **[jrt-fatals.c](jrt-fatals.c.md)**: Handles fatal errors and assertions by exiting with a specified status code and logging error messages.
- **[jrt-libc-includes.h](jrt-libc-includes.h.md)**: Header file for including standard C library headers like ctype, setjmp, stdarg, stdio, stdlib, and string.
- **[jrt-types.h](jrt-types.h.md)**: Header file for including standard type definitions in the JerryScript core.
- **[jrt.h](jrt.h.md)**: Header file defining macros and attributes for assertions, logging, and utility functions in JerryScript.
